testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Login page should remain visible for invalid credentials. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Login page should remain visible for invalid credentials. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.tui.qa.stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.theLoginOutcomeShouldBe(LoginSteps.java:78) at ✽.the login outcome should be "FAILURE"(file:///Users/KS26642/IdeaProjects/TUI-Mobile-Automation/src/test/resources/features/login.feature:13)
